title: [Control Systems] Phoenix Contact Security Advisory (AV26-247)
description: On March 18, 2026, Phoenix Contact published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: FL SWITCH 2xxx  3.50 firmware versions prior to 3.53
FL SWITCH TSN 23xx  3.50 firmware versions prior to 3.53
FL SWITCH 59xx  3.50 firmware versions prior to 3.53
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
